description: A minimal, self-hosted AI gateway for SRE teams that proxies prompts to open, compliant LLMs, ensuring no vendor legal restrictions by avoiding proprietary tools like Copilot in production workflows.
core_features: Proxy SRE-specific prompts (e.g., incident analysis, runbook generation) to open LLMs like Llama or Mistral via local Ollama.
Log all inputs/outputs for audit trails and compliance verification.
Simple CLI interface for quick integration into SRE scripts and terminals.
Configurable model selection and safety filters to mimic enterprise protections without vendor dependencies.
mvp_scope: 3-day build: (1) FastAPI server with /generate endpoint accepting SRE prompts, routing to local Ollama (Llama 3.1); (2) Basic logging to SQLite; (3) CLI client using requests; (4) Docker container for easy deployment; tested with sample SRE prompts like 'analyze this alert log' without external APIs.
success_metric: Processes 100+ SRE prompts daily in a test environment with zero vendor API calls (verified via logs), 90% user satisfaction on response quality/usefulness (internal survey), and full audit trail generation for 100% of interactions.
source_problem: Vendor Legal Restrictions Limiting AI Usage in Production Environments
